summary: Re-tested the Sidebar mobile-drawer fix from iteration_3. All 4 viewport behaviours (375 / 768 / 1024 / 1920) PASS, all 4 regression checks PASS. FIX 1 is now SHIPPING-READY. No new console errors, no page errors during route navigation.

regression.preexisting_401_on_/api/auth/me_before_l: pre-existing noise from iteration_2, not introduced by this fix

critical_code_review_comments: Sidebar.jsx correctly uses `-translate-x-full lg:translate-x-0` so the drawer is hidden by default below lg and stays inline at lg+. ✓
Hamburger (`sidebar-mobile-toggle`) is `lg:hidden fixed top-12 left-2 z-30` — doesn't collide with the WindowChrome bar. ✓
Backdrop is z-40, sidebar is z-50 — backdrop click outside the 240px sidebar correctly closes the drawer. ✓
useEffect on `location.pathname` correctly auto-closes the drawer on route change. Verified by clicking nav-mtk at 375px (sidebar went from x=0 to x=-240 after URL changed to /mtk). ✓
useLocation imported correctly from react-router-dom (line 2). No 'useLocation is not defined' or cleanup warnings during route hops. ✓

Minor (non-blocking): The mobile drawer is `fixed inset-y-0 left-0` but the parent layout still reserves a 240px slot at lg+ because of `w-60 flex-shrink-0` outside the lg:relative. This is intentional and works — leaving as-is.
Hero card title 'GET AETHER FOR WINDOWS' (uppercase via CSS, raw text 'Get Aether for Windows') renders on ONE 20px-tall line at 375px width=343 — letter-by-letter wrap bug from iter_3 is gone.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sidebar drawer fix verified at 375/768/1024/1920 with all sub-behaviours (off-screen default, hamburger toggle, backdrop, X close, backdrop close, auto-close-on-route-change, hero title single-line at 375). All P0/P2 fixes from iterations 1-3 are shipping-ready. Task can be considered complete.
